## Categories to log

- Image generators (Midjourney, SDXL, Flux, DALL·E, Krea, Recraft)
- 3D tools (Blender, Spline, Polycam, Luma, Tripo, Meshy)
- Video / motion (Runway, Pika, Sora, Veo, Kaiber)
- Audio (ElevenLabs, Suno)
- Type foundries / licensing portals
- Stock photo / video subscriptions
- Research / data tools paid for during the project

## Approval audit

For each paid tool, confirm:

- [ ] User explicitly approved use (or default-approved per project policy).
- [ ] License covers the actual usage (commercial / non-commercial / educational).
- [ ] Output usage rights are documented.
